title: Linux Swap Memory 관리하기
description: Linux Swap Memory 관리하기 documents overview material for Swap in the system domain. It is classified as an operation page for the kernel class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Swap Space 만들기, Swap file, ZRAM, Swap ON/OFF, and vm. swappiness, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include linux, memory, zram, linux swap memory 관리하기, and system, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is system / swap / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
